feature.name: q_IntegrationActions1
feature.value: Fusion ERP Accounts Recievables, Fusion ERP Accounts Payables

feature.name: RM_PROPERTIES
feature.value: {Account=Line Item, Entity=Entity, NoDirectTaxdimCategory=No Category, Bank=Bank, Category=Category, NoDSOdimParty=No Party, NoFixedAssetsdimCategory=No Category, NoIndirectTaxdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoProjectPaymentsdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoSalarydimParty=No Party, NoSalarydimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, No Category=No Category, NoProjectReceiptsdimCategory=No Category, NoRecurringdimParty=No Party, NoProjectPaymentsdimParty=No Party, NoDPOdimCategory=No Category, NoDirectTaxdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, Version=Version, Currency=Currency, NoSalarydimCategory=No Category, NoProjectReceiptsdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, OCF_CUBE_FOR_TEMPLATE=OEP_DCSH, NoIndirectTaxdimParty=No Party, NoProjectReceiptsdimParty=No Party, NoProjectPaymentsdimCategory=No Category, NoRecurringdimCategory=No Category, NoDSOdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, Years=Years, NoExpensePaydimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoRevenuePaydimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoTrenddimParty=No Party, OCF_PERIODICITY=Monthly, NoRecurringdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoDSOdimCategory=No Category, Period=Period, NoTrenddimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoExpensePaydimCategory=No Category, NoIndirectTaxdimCategory=No Category, Scenario=Scenario, NoExpensePaydimParty=No Party, NoFixedAssetsdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoFixedAssetsdimParty=No Party, NoRevenuePaydimParty=No Party, NoDirectTaxdimParty=No Party, NoDPOdimBusinessUnit=No Business Unit, NoTrenddimCategory=No Category, NoRevenuePaydimCategory=No Category, NoDPOdimParty=No Party}
